title: Cooling valve stiction with command-position mismatch
summary: Command increased while position and cooling flow lagged; reactor temperature rose after the valve deviation.
outcome: Inspection draft approved; valve serviced under the plant permit process.

title: Valve position feedback calibration bias
summary: Position feedback diverged from command but cooling flow and reactor temperature remained stable.
outcome: Instrument calibration corrected; no process restriction found.

title: Cooling header pressure disturbance
summary: Cooling flow fell across multiple users without a local command-position mismatch.

title: Cooling-flow transmitter dropout
summary: Flow quality changed to bad while valve position and thermal response remained normal.
outcome: Instrument wiring repaired after approved field inspection.

title: Approved feed-rate step increased cooling demand
summary: Feed and heat duty rose before controller output; valve position followed correctly.
outcome: No maintenance action; event recorded as normal operation.

title: Condenser performance degradation
summary: Condenser outlet temperature and duty changed gradually without an FV-101 mismatch.
outcome: Cleaning scope drafted for planned outage.

title: Recycle compressor bearing vibration
summary: Drive-end vibration and bearing temperature increased before process load changed.
outcome: Condition-monitoring work order drafted and approved.

title: Separator level controller oscillation
summary: Separator level oscillated while reactor cooling and pressure were stable.
outcome: Engineering review requested; no online tuning performed by Solera.

title: Stripper quality proxy deviation
summary: Product moisture increased with lower reboiler duty and stable reactor conditions.
outcome: Procedure review and lab confirmation requested.

title: Historian ingest delay during investigation
summary: Multiple Tags were stale with aligned timestamps; the Agent declined a process conclusion.
outcome: Pulse warning raised; analysis resumed after freshness recovered.
